# Beginner Pantry Recipes

> Beginner Pantry Recipes is an English recipe generator for beginner cooks. It turns pantry photos and typed ingredients into beginner-safe, step-by-step recipes.

## Core Pages

- / - Recipe Generator From Ingredients You Have
- /easy-pantry-meals-for-beginners - Easy Pantry Meals for Beginners
- /recipes-without/oven - Recipes Without an Oven
- /use-up/leftover-rice - Use Up Leftover Rice Safely
- /what-can-i-make-with/pantry-staples - What Can I Make With Pantry Staples?

## Safety Sources

- USDA safe minimum internal temperatures
- FDA leftover and refrigeration safety guidance

## Notes

The MVP has no login, no payment, and no database. Uploaded images and text are used for the current AI request only.
